content:
# Sem Ed

**Summary**: A technique to identify and characterize cement and clay types in rock samples.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2017-benaafi|Benaafi, 2017]] used SEM-EDX on 10 samples to identify cement and clay types.

- [[2024-akomolafe|Akomolafe, 2024]] used SEM-EDS to characterize the composition of perlite and hematite additives.

## Instruments and Software



- [[2024-akomolafe|Akomolafe, 2024]] used SEM-EDS to characterize the composition of perlite and hematite additives.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- Identified specific cement and clay minerals within the sandstone matrix. ([[2017-benaafi|Benaafi, 2017, p. 120]])

- Used to confirm the composition of particles in the drilling fluid samples. ([[2024-akomolafe|Akomolafe, 2024, p. 8]])
